title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
